textPlain: Looks great!  It's cool how you are able to unify multiple sources into a single searchable layer. I’m curious how you chose which connectors to support first (e.g. GitHub, Notion, Slack) and how you plan to scale connector coverage?  Thanks!
it's currently guided by community feedback, github issues, and user talks. and we rely on private e2e test suites for maintaining quality as we scale coverage
